summary:
PROPHETIC REVIVAL AND HEAVENLY MUSIC: Brandon describes a coming spiritual revival in Australia, Africa, and New Zealand, accompanied by an outpouring of the Holy Spirit. Brandon states that new, unheard heavenly songs will be given to musicians who seek to worship rather than pursue fame or financial gain.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon warns of impending cyber attacks on the United States power grid, specifically targeting highly populated areas such as Los Angeles, the Bay Area, Chicago, and New York. Brandon links these attacks and Trojan horses to presidential tariffs and sanctions, warning of sustained outages lasting several days. Brandon calls for prayers of protection over the nation's cyber defense teams, major public gatherings, the World Series, holiday shopping events, the economy, and political figures navigating international sanctions against Russian oil.

BIBLICAL TRIBULATION AND GLOBAL PLAGUES: Brandon asserts that the world is entering the biblical timeframe of the beginning of sorrows outlined in Matthew 24, characterized by unavoidable wars, famines, and pestilences. Brandon predicts a forthcoming plague significantly more severe than COVID, alongside a catastrophic economic crash surpassing the Great Depression of the 1930s. Brandon emphasizes that believers will face intense pressure and shaking before a pre-tribulation rapture, requiring a profound sense of urgency and reliance on scriptures like Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 for protection.

INSTITUTIONAL CHURCH SHAKING AND MASS HARVEST: Brandon outlines a massive, imminent shaking of religious institutions, including the Catholic Church and the LDS Mormon church, aimed at correcting false doctrines and sparking major revivals. Brandon envisions a widespread return to authentic holiness and grassroots worship, comparing it to historical tent revivals and brush arbor churches. Brandon notes that this movement will bring a massive harvest of souls, including marginalized groups, requiring established believers to demonstrate patience as they spiritually nurture new converts.

PUBLIC FIGURES AND HOLLYWOOD CONVERSIONS: Brandon details specific spiritual visions concerning various celebrities and political figures, calling for radical Christian conversions for individuals like Alex Jones, Tucker Carlson, Joe Rogan, and the Kardashians. Brandon describes demonic entities attached to Kanye West and Katy Perry, observing a critical fork in the road for Justin Bieber regarding his marriage and career. Brandon prays for the protection of figures like Pam Bondi and the Trump family against bounties, while warning of impending deception from celebrities who will falsely claim Christian faith to promote a universalist gospel.

ENTERTAINMENT AND SPORTS REVIVAL: Brandon predicts a significant spiritual awakening within professional sports leagues, including the NFL and NBA, as well as the country music industry. Brandon also focuses on the entertainment sector, specifically praying for the protection and success of Mel Gibson and the upcoming sequel to The Passion of the Christ, noting that physical healing and spiritual salvation require the exact same level of faith.

SUPERNATURAL DELIVERANCE AND WEATHER ANOMALIES: Brandon concludes by speaking about deliverance from severe trauma and generational strongholds, specifically mentioning freedom from PTSD for military and law enforcement personnel. Brandon describes a vision of individuals trapped in a twisted brown wicker basket with cobwebs tied to Ireland, stating that spiritual freedom is breaking these bonds. Additionally, Brandon calls for literal and spiritual rain to break geographical droughts.
rawData: [October 24, 2025]-[Praying over the Power grid]-[https://youtu.be/h5AFOcz8eI4]-[For it reaches to the highest mountain. Those are communion cups from the last couple times. I have to start picking up my stuff a little bit more. Oh, there it goes. All four. Bummer. Is anybody here? Yeah. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus. Thank you, Father, for your angels that watch over us tonight as we pray. Thank you, Father, that we only pray with your heart, no flesh. Thank you, Lord. We go right into the throne, Lord. Ready? Good evening, family. How are y'all doing today? I just wanted to come on tonight and pray with you for a little bit. Last night when we prayed, we prayed really late to reach other parts of the world, but my heart was to pray for Australia. We prayed for Australia, Africa, and New Zealand. The Lord was showing us a great revival coming to Australia, a fresh, new, mighty outpouring of the Spirit of God. Then I was seeing new songs; new heavenly songs are going to start to come forth. The Lord was telling us to pull on that. If you are a person that makes music and writes music, I believe there's going to be heavenly music given to you as you press into the Father. You're not seeking fame or finances, but you're seeking just to worship. I believe the Lord doesn't care if we have blessings, as long as the blessings don't have us. I want you to know that's what the Lord was showing us: that there are new heavenly songs coming. There are songs that we've never heard before that are going to be glorious. Beautiful music is coming, and I would expect it right now. As we were praying last night, we saw the power grid again. As President Trump starts doing these tariffs and sanctions, the Lord showed me attacks against the power grid: Los Angeles, the Bay Area, Chicago, and New York—these places of great populations. The Lord told us last night we need to pray against power outages concerning cyber attacks and cyber warfare. I don't know who would be taking care of our power grid—maybe our army or whoever is over the cyber division—to have supernatural wisdom on how to combat the attacks that are coming. I believe they've already started. I saw Trojan horses coming in and causing disruption in our power grid in America in a greater way. It would not just be a couple of hours of power outage; we're talking a sustained amount of power being out for maybe days. I'm not trying to stir up fear; I'm trying to tell you it's something you should be prayerful about. Every single thing I bring to you is to bring prayer over our nation and for our president, for Homeland Security, the FBI, and the CIA. I just believe that there's power in prayer. Just as we saw that the man in Atlanta was going to try to do a mass shooting there and he was stopped by the authorities. All glory to God. There was confusion in the camp, and that's what we pray: that they don't have their thoughts right when they're trying to do things like that. He went in and his family told on him, and then all of a sudden the authorities said they believed that he was going back. He was scoping out the area and going back to his truck to get whatever he was going to get to hurt people. I believe this is what we're called to do. We're assembling together tonight to stop Satan's plans. Principalities work through personalities. Weak-minded people who already have a reprobate mind and are not strong in the Word are coming in, and they're trying to grab a hold of these people that already have yielded themselves over to demonic influence. We want to pray for a hedge of protection around our sporting events, including the World Series that starts tomorrow, Friday. We pray over the World Series; it's best out of seven. We are praying over our college events and any kind of major event: Thanksgiving, Black Friday, and all these things. We are praying over our economy and for President Trump. As he said, he's putting more sanctions on Russia and their oil companies, so we know what will happen with that. I just believe this situation—you try to put people in a corner by touching their pocketbook—but I've seen an escalation of things. I heard one pastor say, 'Oh, Brandon, we're going to stop war altogether.' Well, that goes against Matthew 24. I'm going to line up with the Word, not with what you think. The Bible said we would have wars and rumors of wars. We'll have plagues, pestilences, and famines. This is the beginning of sorrows, and I believe we're in that timeframe. No matter how much we try to stop it, you're not going to stop the Bible. The Bible stands alone, and there is no prophetic word that's going to go against the Word of God. If it goes against the Word of God, it's not God and it's not a prophetic word; it's a false word, a false prophecy. We know what's coming, ladies and gentlemen. The Lord said to me today while I was outside, 'Brandon, there's not enough urgency. Again, you must tell My people I'm coming again. You must tell them that they need to have a sense of urgency about My coming.' I went over what I said to you all yesterday. Every time I go over everything I've said to you because I don't want any prophetic confusion. I've said a thousand times, and Paul Begley and others say, 'Brandon, you're called to be like a prophet,' but I always say I'm a watchman and I believe I have a prophetic lens. I'm able to see, and the Lord said, 'Your main focus is to bring prayer to YouTube. I want you to bring a massive prayer audience. I want a million-man and woman prayer army. As you pray, you will change things and you will protect what's coming.' If they don't know Psalm 91 and Psalm 23, they're in trouble. Is that to scare you? No, it's to prepare you. You must know the Word of God. You must understand your covenant. I know there are a lot of Word of Faith people who believe we're not going to go through anything, saying, 'Well, brother, as long as we're the salt, we're holding back the Antichrist.' I believe wholeheartedly that we are the salt and the restrainer because the Holy Ghost is in us. Some people believe we're going to go through the whole tribulation. I do not. I believe that we're not appointed unto wrath, and I believe with all my heart that we'll be taken out of here before all that mess starts. But it's not the beginning of sorrows, and I believe we're going to see some things before the Great Tribulation begins. That's just me. I believe some of the other people in my circle believe the same way. I'm telling you what I feel inside my spirit: the beginning, the birthing pains. As labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, we're going to see some stuff. The Lord told me about what the word was, Braden. I want to say the exact word. He said, "I'm putting in my closers." And closers are built for pressure. Great pressure is coming. You must have a sense of urgency. What's the C-word, Braden? I've said it a thousand times today, and my mind, when I get on these live streams, just kind of goes. Obviously, we need to write this stuff down when He gives us these words because it's not our vocabulary. So, just knowing that we have to be that person with the backbone, with the crowbar. I'm trying to tell you all, the Lord's been talking to me outside while I've been cleaning and doing the things I've been doing. He said, "You must come at this stronger, for the great harvest of souls is ahead. For many are called, but few are chosen, for the harvest is plentiful and the labors are few." That's why I'm having the urgency of saying, Braden, having the closer. Where we are right now in this dispensation, we're about to enter into the dispensation of judgment, but we're in grace for just this little bit of a window left. Right now, He's calling forth His church to have some urgency to bring in the harvest. That's why I was trying to tell you all yesterday, not that I was knocking having a hundred souls born again or having a few people getting born again, but I said, "Where is the church having major mass revival?" The Lord said to me, "Brandon, I'm waiting on the souls. I'm leaving the ninety-nine to go after the one." That's why I was pushing in, saying, "Lord, anoint me with a special anointing, whatever it takes to bring in the harvest like a Billy Graham in these last days to bring in the lost." If 170-some thousand people die daily and you only get a hundred people born again, I don't feel like that's great numbers. Even if we all got a hundred people saved, we need millions of people to get saved. I believe it's going to come through a great shaking to awaken. Every time I pray this, He says, "Brandon, that's why I'm bringing the shaking. Everything is going to be about a change within a 24-hour period." He keeps talking about a major change within a 24-hour period. A major shaking is coming. Everything that we've ever known will change. When we went to the 23rd of September, He told me, "Brandon, after this timeframe, a great acceleration will come. A great acceleration will come from the 23rd of September, from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah." He said, "Remember, as labor pains upon a woman, we see the acceleration and it's going." He said, "This would be the time of the point of no return. It's time for the push." When I say the point of no return, I'm talking about whenever a woman can get an epidural. There's only a certain time of the labor that you can get an epidural. But the Lord said to me, "Brandon, we are at that point right now of the push, as labor pains, to be contenders." We must be contenders. We must fight for what's ours. You can't lay down and just feel sorry for yourself. The Lord said, "Brandon, I'm putting in the fighters. How bad do you want the outpouring of the Spirit of God on this last generation?" You think the devil's going to sit by and not try to put up a wall to restrain this or try to stop it? You're going to have to contend for it. You're going to have to have a bulldog-on-a-bone type of personality that says, "I'm the one that's going to make it upstream. I'm the salmon that's going to make it upstream. I'm going to be the one that witnesses into this earth." That's why He said, "For the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few." As I observe church services and look at the pulse—and I'm not trying to pick at anybody, I'm telling you through the prophetic lens of what I'm praying over—where's the urgency in the church? People say, "Well, Brandon, you're too harsh." As you drive down the road, the only way I can describe this to you is you can see the ones that are truly successful, the business owner versus the one that works for the one who owns the business. Your mentality has to change, thinking bigger for these end times. How big of a soul harvest are you believing for? If I just get one saved, folks, you've got to think bigger than that. The Lord said, "Brandon, believe bigger. I wish that none should perish, but all come to repentance." What if we had all the people who've ever been saved for the last 2,000 years all saved within a couple of years? Greater works will you do. Think bigger. But what will it take? Money. It takes finances. How much money does it take to get the gospel out? Just for TV time, it takes millions of dollars. Believe big. He's exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. And the Lord taught me it's time to expand your capacity. You need to think bigger for what I'm about to do in this end-time army. You're thinking too small. If I could believe God for a million dollars, that's a lot to me. But the Lord said, "You're thinking too small, Brandon." I thought, "Wow." For somebody who made minimum wage all their life, a million dollars will change your life. But to somebody who's already a multimillionaire, they look at it and say, "Braden, a million dollars ain't nothing." But to somebody who hadn't had nothing, that's a lot. And the Lord said, "You need to think bigger." That's why I drove through West Palm Beach. He said, "Look at Billionaire Road. Enlarge your capacity to believe Me. Think different." So when I was looking at the souls, that's what I was trying to tell you all. When I was looking at the souls and things, you see Rodney Howard-Browne, he has big altar calls, and you see Billy Graham, but you don't see a lot of people having big altar calls anymore. Very seldom do you even see anybody—I go to a lot of churches and you don't see very many altar calls with even one or two people getting saved. I thought that's a shame. There has to be more. Because that's what He said when He's touching the doorknob. I looked at Him in the vision and I saw Jesus, and He said, "I'm waiting on My Father's instruction to tell Me to come and get you." And I asked the Father, and it was thunderous. He said, "Brandon, you help Me bring in the harvest and I'll come and get you. That's all you're waiting on is a major outpouring." So I thought, "What brings in the harvest?" My mind has just been turning because once you've experienced the glory one time—I'm not picking at anybody, but I'm looking for authentic. People say they've been to heaven, they've done this, they've done that. I'm looking for authentic. I want the presence when you're talking. If you say you've seen my Father, if you say you've seen my Jesus, is there a presence on you when you talk about it? Because when I'm telling you what I've been in front of, in his presence there's fullness of joy. In his presence, there's fullness of love. And I'm telling you, the glorious church will rise out of it. When you say you have an impartation from my Father, there should be fruit. I want to see fruit. I don't want to just hear words. I don't want to hear just a story. I want to see the glory. And I believe the people who walk with him are going to display glory. When you say that, I want to see glory on your face. I want to look upon his face. With one touch, with one breath, it'll change you forever. When you just behold his face, it will change you forever. You'll never be the same. A real radical touch from Jesus; you'll never be the same. It's that fire that never burns out; it's the water that never runs dry. Do you understand? And when you say you've seen him—whenever I've seen somebody who's authentically had an encounter with him, because I believe I have—it changes you. It makes you hungry. It makes you desperate. There's nothing more that you want other than just to get away from this world and go, 'How can I be with you?' There's nothing more. I don't care who you are. One touch, one drink, and you'll become addicted. Other than that, I question if you're authentic or not. I question you because I know when you touch it and you drink it, it changes you forever. And that's whenever he tells me, and I see it and I had these experiences with him. He says, 'Brandon, I'm coming.' And I'm like, 'There's nothing I want more. You couldn't offer me a fleet of Ferraris. You couldn't offer me a fleet of yachts. Jesus is all you want. Once you taste the glory, once you taste his presence, once you look upon his face, once you look into his eyes, there's nothing more you ever want. I remember he looked at me and he said, 'Brandon, are you willing to die for me? Are you willing to lay down your life for the cause if I ask you to?' Oh God, you ask so much. But yes, of course, whatever it takes to get this gospel out, Lord. Charlie Kirk, no matter how you get the threats, how many people try to come against you and tell you they want to hurt you, they want to do things to you, I have a family to protect, but at the same time, I know that all the disciples died other than one by martyrdom. What did it take to get the gospel out 2,000 years ago? What pressure? How much of a sacrifice? Why were they so radical? They had walked with him. They had been with him for three years. Do you understand? Once they tasted the glory, once they experienced the presence of God, they were willing to lay everything down for the cause of Christ. That's somebody who's truly seen him and truly been with him because there's nothing else that matters. I try to tell you all this because there's coming a point in time that the pressure is coming. He said the olive pressure—like olives—he said the pressure is coming on my church, Brandon, and the oil will flow. A new Holy Ghost oil will flow, but it's coming out of pressure in Canada, in America, in England, China, Europe, South America. Most people are in La La Land. They don't look at what's coming. And he told me a great shaking's coming, and most people don't want to hear it. I caught wind of some of this last week. We don't want to hear that. Well, you need to hear it because it's coming whether you like it or not. You're not going to stop it. I told you you must pray; a plague's coming. I told you a plague worse than COVID on steroids is coming. Most people don't want to hear that. Am I trying to scare you? No. I'm trying to prepare you way in advance. Does it have to affect you in your house? No. Do you hear me? No. What is Psalm 91? 'A thousand shall fall at my side and ten thousand at my right hand, but it will not come nigh me.' No pestilence, no plagues, no nothing will come nigh me. Psalm 23: 'Though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil. Why? Because his rod and his staff comfort me. He prepares a table before me in the presence of all my enemies. My cup runneth over. Surely goodness and mercy follow me.' I just believe that God's able to do what he said he would do. And when you become fully persuaded like Abraham, I'm fully persuaded that what God has promised, he's able also to perform it. And he said he'd give his angels charge over me to bear me up in their hands, lest I dash my foot against a stone. So I'm not afraid of any plagues. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord regardless of where I'm at in life. I still believe a thousand bullets fall at my side and ten thousand on my right hand, but nothing shall come nigh me, my wife, and my children. I anoint my head with oil, my cup runneth over. Surely goodness and mercy follow me. I just believe that he is my provider. And regardless of economic crisis, regardless of what I've told you, a 1930s-style crash is coming—one worse than what we had before 100 years ago. 'Oh, Brandon, now you're really freaking me out.' I said one that's worse than you can ever comprehend is what I have seen multiple times as I pray. But the Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm giving you a window for a financial blessing for my people who prayed last year at this time when we were interceding for the election.' He said, 'I'm giving you a longer window. I'm giving you a space of time to get your house in order, to get your boat ready for a major shaking to awaken is coming.' And that's what's been stirring in me today. I've been praying over it, interceding for the harvest. He said, 'For I'm bringing a shaking to awaken for a harvest, for they're all asleep.' Most of my church and most people go, 'Well, I don't believe that. I'm charismatic.' Are you the only one in the church? Why is it always about the charismatics? Why is it always about the Word of Faith people? We're the church. You're blind and you're full of pride. There's Baptists, there's Methodists, there's Catholics, there's Church of Christ. They all love the Lord. They just have different doctrine than you do. I'm trying to tell you there's all kinds of believers and God is calling all of us to be assembled as one body. And he said, 'I'm bringing down all the tents and you will operate as one body, radically born again, excited about my soon return.' And it's not going to be, 'Well, I speak in tongues, you don't; you're Catholic, this'—I mean them all. But I'm going to tell you what we all have in common is we love Jesus. That's why I say I don't like religion; I just want a relationship. And people get upset about that. 'Why did you say you don't like religion?' Because religious tents—this is what I'm talking about. 'Well, you're this, you're that'—who cares. Let's just have a heart for Jesus. I said a great shaking is coming to the Catholic Church, a radical shaking, and there will be a great revival. And then he showed me that he was correcting the LDS and a great shaking was coming to the LDS and there would be a splitting of the church. And he said he's correcting wrong doctrine, for it's a cult. And he said, "Brandon, I'm going to correct it, but I'm going to visit them because there's hungry people in there and they're good people, just because they have false doctrine in some things." He said, "Brandon, I'm going to shake that church and a great revival will come forth out of it and there'll be a separation." A lot of people don't want to hear that, but this is what he said. "I'm going to correct some things in the LDS and the Mormons, and I'm going to correct this because it's false doctrine, and I'm going to shake it and there'll be a great revival and I'm going to save those people. There's good people there; they're just blinded by things." That might step on some people's toes that go to church there, but I'm trying to tell you what the Lord said. And he said a great revival will come forth out of it and I will save many. He said, "I'm going after the transgenders. I'm going after the homosexuals. I'm going after the ones in the way-back fields, Brandon. I'm going to have a radical move of God; a radical move of my presence is going to come on all these. I'm going to pour out my spirit upon all flesh and a great shaking, a great repentance, turning back to God, is coming, preaching righteousness and holiness back in the church." You see, you're believing for America to change, but America won't change until the pulpits change. People don't want to hear it, but a great shaking is coming. It won't be skinny jeans and fog machines; it will be Holy Ghost. Real Holy Ghost. He's going to shake the church. And I told you I saw fires on the pews. I saw the church bells ringing. He said, "I'm going to ring the church bells one last time," a major calling the people to come forth. He asked, "What did the church bells ring for?" So I started looking it up. It was for signs for major events that were taking place: for weddings, funerals, things like that. But it was symbolic. And the Lord said, "I'm going to shake with the church bells again throughout the land." It's symbolic. But the church pews will be filled with fire and I saw babies all outside. And he said, "Be patient with my babies, church, for you were once a baby. Be patient with my babies. I'll hold you accountable for how the church treats them. How will you treat my babies when they come?" They all had soiled diapers and I saw those Leave it to Beaver mothers gathering the babies and they were spoon-feeding them one at a time, feeding those babies, and they were out there and they were crying and they looked like the babies off of that old cartoon thing—I hate to say it was Roger Rabbit—that baby with the curlicue hair. And the Lord said to me, "Do you see those babies? Be patient with them. For you were once a baby and people were patient with you some of the time. You must be patient with the babies. They're coming. Holy Ghost Woodstock's coming, a glorious church, a glorious outpouring with brush arbor churches." And I thought it was awesome because Sister Billy during the tent revival brought up a group called Homestead Pickers. It was a banjo player; he was up there and he talked about what a brush arbor church was and how they used to have old brush arbor churches in Missouri, in the Branson area, and they would cut the wood and they would make a place for church and they'd play their banjos and they would have baptisms in the creek and the Holy Spirit would move and they'd have Pentecostal prayer. I'm telling you, it's coming back. Great revival's coming. Holy Spirit has moved in here big time. The presence of the Lord has invaded my house. Wow. You felt it when it shifted, son? I can feel it. It's all over me. Fires all over my body. But he's giving one last call to y'all. I stand as a watchman to warn you. He's dissatisfied. I want you to hear me. He's dissatisfied with the hunger of the church right now at his return. He's dissatisfied with the urgency of the church right now. He said, "I'm dissatisfied. I'm fed up with it. They're not ready, son. I have no choice for what's coming." Oh, Lord, I don't want to hear that. He said, "I don't have a choice anymore. I'm out of time. I'm out of time." And what is coming will shake the most. And there'll be a great falling away with a lot of them. A lot of them will say this is an Ichabod. I need you to hear me. A lot of them will say what's about to take place in this earth will be like an Ichabod. But it is not. It's a shaking to awaken. "I will never leave you and I will never forsake you, Brandon. I'm shaking the people awake." They'll be like, "What? What's going on? Where did God go? Why am I going through this? How come?" Because he has to get your attention. He doesn't want anybody to perish. Do you know the ark door's closing and Noah was up there yelling over and over, "Hey, the flood's coming! Hey, the flood's coming!" "Haha, you're an idiot. It's never rained before. What are you talking about, fool? It's never rained before." "Hey, the flood's coming. You better get on the boat." And everybody looked at that old Noah; he's an old nut, isn't he? Crazy old guy. As in the days of Noah, so will it be, remember. But God said, "I'm willing to shake them so that they'll see even more what's coming." For I wish that none... this is the grand finale. This is it. This is the grand finale. Do you understand? This is the big fireworks show. This is it. The point of no return. You say, "Well, I've heard this before." How long did Noah tell everybody, too? "Ah, I've heard it before, Brandon." It's coming until the hand shuts that door and it's over. Get ready. I'm trying to warn you again. I've felt such an urgency all day today as I've been praying. I said, "Where is the urgency in my church, Brandon, about my return? Where are the people calling out for repentance to warn them that the Son is coming, that the tribulation is at hand?" Many false people, many false prophets, many false doctrines, many for there to deceive many will try to come. That's why I try to be so watchful over what I put out here because I don't want to be ever accused of that. You sit there and you say, "Listen, all I can tell you is I have an urgency to warn you that Jesus is coming every single time I come on here because I have these visitations." And he says, "Pray and warn my people." I say, "Okay," giving them an opportunity to get born again, which I'm about to do before we start to pray. If you don't know my friend Jesus—you may know a lot about him, but does he know you? You're hearing all that I'm saying right now and you feel that inward tug at your heart right now and you're feeling that stirring and you're going, "Brandon, I don't know, boy. I feel like I'm going to come up out of my skin." It's because the Holy Spirit is drawing you right now, telling you you better get on the right side of things. If you don't know, my friend, if you don't have a saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ, tonight's your night. Well, I don't know about that. I'll wait. It's appointed unto man once to die, and after that the judgment. The very shoes you put on today to go to work, to do whatever you're going to do tonight, the undertaker might be taking them off that evening. No man is promised tomorrow. You could die tonight in your sleep. You could die whatever. But I believe with long life they'll satisfy. But if he calls me home, we go home. You understand? I want you to always have the mindset that no one's promised tomorrow and that you need Jesus Christ to make it. I want you to think about this: if you were to die today, where would you spend eternity? Would you spend eternity in hell or would you spend eternity in heaven? There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. Where will you spend eternity if you were to die today? Well, I don't believe that. It doesn't change anything. I don't care about what you believe. What's the truth is the word of God. And no man comes to the Father unless he's drawn. But without Jesus Christ, no one can be born again. You must know Jesus. You must have a relationship with him. So if you're here today and you used to be on fire for the Lord, you used to have a relationship with him. You used to be excited about being a Christian, but you've fallen away from it. You don't want to have anything to do with it anymore. But tonight, you're watching and you're going, 'You know what? I need to get my life right.' I believe it's not a coincidence that you're here. I believe that same Holy Spirit that drew you the first time and you walked away from him. He's never turned his back on you. You turned your back on him. It's just like the prodigal son.
